form.formComment: Drawn the inside. Most recently finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 3 over 400m at this track behind Mr. Kia Ora beaten 5 lengths (23.23). Capable of taking this out.

formComments.comment: Drawn the inside. Most recently finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 3 over 400m at this track behind Mr. Kia Ora beaten 5 lengths (23.23). Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.79) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 4 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and five places from 10 starts. Makes strong appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (22.79) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 4 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and five places from 10 starts. Makes strong appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a slick early split and went straight to the front, giving a huge sight but headed late when a head second (23.90) at Bendigo. Has clocked a strong 22.66 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a slick early split and went straight to the front, giving a huge sight but headed late when a head second (23.90) at Bendigo. Has clocked a strong 22.66 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a OPEN on April 5 over 400m at Mt Gambier behind Mister Cadillac beaten 6 lengths (23.26). Not among the main chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a OPEN on April 5 over 400m at Mt Gambier behind Mister Cadillac beaten 6 lengths (23.26). Not among the main chances this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth over 390m at Warrnambool, beaten 12 lengths (23.24) behind Mischief Mate in a Grade 5 on April 2. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running last time with a strong early split and tried to lead throughout but had to settle for the minors when second (24.59) at Sale over 435m. Capable of a good showing.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.70) at Ballarat in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 8 lengths. Yet to score but has placed each of three runs from this draw. Has ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by a neck at Shepparton (22.04) beating Foxy Jay in a Grade 5 on March 23. Look for improvement. Not out of it.
